news.summary: Paris, France - On April 4, 2025, Eviden, a business under the Atos Group specializing in digital, cloud, big data, and security, disclosed that it achieved a standard-level accreditation from the French National Agency for Information Systems Security (ANSSI) for its Trustway IP Protect solution. This recognition confirms the trustworthiness, strength, and efficacy of the virtual private network (VPN) in safeguarding confidential communications and data.
news.headline: Eviden's Trustway IP Protect VPN gets ANSSI standard qualification, showing reliability and security.

news.summary: SES S.A. recently conducted its Annual General Meeting in Betzdorf, Luxembourg, where shareholders approved all resolutions suggested by the Board of Directors. Among the decisions made were the endorsement of the 2024 annual accounts and a proposed annual dividend of EUR 0.50 per A-share and EUR 0.20 per B-share. This figure comprises the prior EUR 0.25 per A-share and EUR 0.10 per B-share interim dividend.
news.headline: SES AGM voting results: Annual dividend of EUR 0.50 per A-share (EUR 0.20 per B-share) approved, along with 2024 annual accounts.

news.summary: A recent report stated that the unemployment rate in the country has increased to 5.2%, marking a rise of 0.3% from the previous month. The total number of unemployed individuals now stands at 1.3 million. Additionally, it was reported that the stock market index dropped by 2.5% in response to the news. These developments have raised concerns about the state of the economy and future job prospects for many citizens. Authorities are closely monitoring the situation and implementing strategies to address the growing unemployment rate.
news.headline: Nemunas Biknius appointed as CEO of Amber Grid Board for a new term.

news.summary: In Los Angeles, Faraday Future Intelligent Electric Inc. (NASDAQ: FFAI) revealed that the Trump Administration's reciprocal tariff policy could benefit U.S.-based automakers. The policy aims to prompt the return of automotive production to the U.S. and assist in creating a favorable environment for this industry. Faraday Future, a California-headquartered global shared intelligent electric mobility ecosystem company, sees this development as a prime opportunity for American automakers.
news.headline: Faraday Future views new U.S. tariff policy as strategic opportunity for automakers. Trump's policy aims to boost production in US. Characters: 120

news.summary: The base architect, Jesse Pollak, has addressed the claims made by Infected, stating that the chain operated as designed, with any problems arising from the frontend.
news.headline: Crypto game Infected moves to Solana due to demand issues, triggers pushback. Base architect Jesse Pollak rebuts, claims issues due to frontend, not chain.

news.summary: Alstom has revealed a significant investment strategy exceeding 150 million euros aimed at boosting production capacity across its facilities in France.
news.headline: Alstom investing 150+ million euros to boost production capacity in France.

news.summary: Aker ASA, based in Oslo, Norway, released its Annual report for the year 2024 along with the Sustainability statement. The documents, in ESEF format, can be found on the company's website www.akerasa.com. This disclosure was made on April 4, 2025.
news.headline: Aker ASA releases 2024 Annual report with Sustainability statement, available on company website.

news.summary: BitMEX co-founder Arthur Hayes believes Trump's tariffs may disrupt the global economy, benefiting Bitcoin's price. Trump's 10% tariff on all countries, with rates up to 34% on China, 20% on EU, and 24% on Japan, has caused the largest Nasdaq 100 point loss. Bitcoin trading at $83,150 is expected to benefit from the weakening US Dollar Index, China's potential weakening yuan, and Fed easing. A weaker dollar and lower US rates are seen as beneficial for risk assets like Bitcoin. Meanwhile, Bitwise Invest's Jeff Park also believes in Bitcoin's growth amidst a weaker dollar and US rates due to Trump's tariffs.
news.headline: Tariffs may fuel Bitcoin rally, says BitMEX's Arthur Hayes. Trump hits countries with 10% tariff, China faces 34%, EU 20%, Japan 24%. BTC at $83,150.

news.summary: Fortnite has introduced a new secret "Dill Bits" server mine location in its latest map update, leading to a spike in the Solana-based memecoin named Dill Bits, which surged by 200% to $0.0005 on April 4. This virtual currency is inspired by the in-game currency in Fortnite but can only be used for purchasing in-game items. The memecoin first launched in February, experiencing a 4,500% price increase to reach a market cap of $4.8 million. Another surge happened on March 9 after the release of a Fortnite video promoting its "Rugpull" storyline. The new Dill Bits server farm location features green servers resembling Bitcoin's servers. Fortnite players can collect Dill Bits by destroying the equipment, leading to excitement within the crypto community as this in-game gimmick aligns with mainstream cryptocurrency themes. The Fortnite Wiki describes the new Dill Bits Mining Server as an "Unnamed Location in Fortnite: Battle Royale" that appeared in Chapter 6: Season 2 near Outlaw Oasis. Fortnite released its most recent update on April 1, including a Mortal Kombat collaboration, quests, skins, and map updates. Dill Bits can be spent at the Black Markets scattered around the game map.
news.headline: Fortnite unveils secret 'Dill Bits' location in latest update, inspiring Solana memecoin spike - up 200% to $0.0005.

news.summary: On April 30, 2025, the Annual General Meeting of Aker ASA, based in Oslo, Norway, will convene virtually at 11:00 CEST. The agenda includes the re-election of the board of directors. This decision comes in response to the global pandemic, ensuring the safety of participants. Aker ASA's commitment to corporate governance and transparency is evident in this approach to conducting business amid challenging circumstances.
news.headline: Aker ASA to hold virtual Annual General Meeting on April 30, 2025, at 11:00 CEST for re-election of the board.

news.summary: European Union regulators are considering imposing a $1 billion fine on Elon Musk's X, factoring in revenue from his other ventures like Tesla and SpaceX. The fine is based on allegations of violating the Digital Services Act, allowing fines of up to 6% of global revenue for violations. X could face product changes, with penalties expected to be announced soon. X contests the allegations, calling it an act of political censorship and an attack on free speech. Another investigation focuses on X's handling of illegal hate speech. The EU probe started in 2023, with a preliminary ruling in 2024 finding X violated the act. Musk accused regulators of offering to drop fines in exchange for content suppression. Authorities denied a secret deal. Musk anticipates a public court battle.
news.headline: EU considering $1B fine for Elon Musk’s X over illicit content, disinformation, in violation of Digital Services Act. More penalties possible.

news.summary: Coinbase has filed with the CFTC for XRP futures contracts, anticipating the launch on April 21. Each contract represents 10,000 XRP worth about $20,000 at $2 per token. Trading will be paused if spot XRP prices move more than 10% in an hour. Bitnomial also launched CFTC-regulated XRP futures in the US in March. XRP futures trading is available on various leading centralized exchanges. XRP derivatives funding rates remain negative, with bearish sentiment prevailing among traders.endforeach
news.headline: Coinbase Institutional seeks CFTC approval for XRP futures trading, aiming for April 21 go-live with $20,000 contracts. Bearish sentiment reflected in negative funding rates on major exchanges. Ripple hot on XRP futures trail in US.

news.summary: Luxembourg, April 4, 2025 - Today, Subsea 7 S.A. revealed that it has secured a significant contract from Shell Offshore Inc. for the development of Sparta deepwater project in the United States. The contract awarded is noteworthy and marks a significant milestone for Subsea 7 S.A. The company's shares (Oslo Børs: SUBC, ADR: SUBCY) are expected to be positively impacted by this development.
news.headline: Subsea7 receives contract from Shell for Sparta deepwater development in US. Sizeable contract awarded on 4 April 2025.

news.summary: In Tokyo on April 4, 2025, Imperial Hotel, Ltd. revealed the appointment of Reiko Sakata as General Manager of the forthcoming Imperial Hotel in Kyoto, projected to launch in spring 2026. The Imperial Hotel, Kyoto has also become a part of The Leading Hotels of the World.
news.headline: Reiko Sakata appointed General Manager at Imperial Hotel, Kyoto opening in 2026; joins Leading Hotels of the World.
